falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if the coefficient on the calendar year-trend is positive at p < 0.05 (apex wealth share rises within countries over 1980-2024). REFUTED if the coefficient is negative (sign-flipped) at p < 0.05. PARTIAL if the sign matches but p >= 0.05. INCONCLUSIVE if the outcome panel cannot be loaded.
falsification_test_text: Panel fixed-effects regression of the WID top-0.1% net personal wealth share on a linear calendar year-trend, country fixed effects only (year FE deliberately omitted so the trend is not absorbed), country-clustered SEs, advanced-economy panel 1980-2024.
